description: A brand manager needs to monitor social media and news outlets for mentions of their brand.

nodes.task_description: Set up a new monitoring query in a social listening tool for the brand name and key product names.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly configures the listening tool.

nodes.task_description: Review the mentions from the last 24 hours.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves a feed of recent brand mentions.

nodes.task_description: Identify a negative news article and flag it for the PR team to review.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies a high-priority mention and escalates it to the appropriate team.
